title: Restrict Viewers inviting viewers/members permissions

posts.author: Bibi (Bibi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

As an admin of my company’s Monday account I need to set viewer users to not be able to invite other viewers. This article states that viewers can Invite new viewers (unless the admin blocks this setting).“”
Please help me find where this can be done.
Thank you!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was about to show you sending a screenshot but…
i cant find it!!!

posts.author: Tabish (Tabish)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe this is what you are looking for
It is under settings

image1920×1015 69.6 KB

posts.author: Bibi (Bibi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tabish, Thank you for the response.
However, I need setting only for the viewers not to be able to add other viewers. This should not be related to my team (non-admin) members permissions.

posts.author: naomiCSM (Naomi SInger)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Bibi Thanks for reaching out to us. You can control this setting by navigating to your Avatar in the bottom left corner, choose the admin section, then the security tab and you can set that only admins can invite members and viewers. See screenshot below:

Viewer Permissions2648×1048 256 KB

Let us know if you have any more questions!
